recommendations.title: Eddington
recommendations.overview: In May of 2020, a standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in Eddington, New Mexico.

recommendations.overview: Following the sudden death of his mother, a mild-mannered but anxiety-ridden man confronts his darkest fears as he embarks on an epic odyssey back home.

recommendations.overview: A man gets trapped inside a telephone box and nobody is able to free him.

recommendations.overview: The eldest son of a ruthlessly tough MMA champion must fight his way out of the abusive cycle his father has continued.

recommendations.title: It Ends with Us
recommendations.overview: When a woman's first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship with a charming, but abusive neurosurgeon is upended, and she realizes she must learn to rely on her own strength to make an impossible choice for her future.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Gimme Shelter
recommendations.overview: After running away from her abusive mother, a streetwise teen seeks refuge with her father, but he rejects her when he learns that she's pregnant.
